basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Project Associate, Project Fellow and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) Project Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Delhi Project Positions Recruitment 2026 for various posts including Project Associate, Project Fellow, Junior Project Technical Assistant, and Project Consultant.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. (Civil) Or Diploma (Civil) + 2 Years of Experience, B.Tech. (Electrical) Or Diploma (Electrical) + 2 Years of Experience, B.Sc. in Agriculture / Horticulture + 2 Years of Experience, B.Tech. (Civil) + 5 Years of Experience or M.Tech. (Civil) + 3 Years of Experience, B.Tech. (Electrical) + 4 Years of Experience, Diploma or Above (Civil) or Equivalent + 2 Years of Experience, M.Tech.(Civil) + 4 Years of Experience or B.Tech. (Civil) + 6 Years of Experience
qualification.details: Project Associate (Civil): B.Tech. (Civil) Or Diploma (Civil) + 2 Years of Experience Project Associate (Electrical): B.Tech. (Electrical) Or Diploma (Electrical) + 2 Years of Experience Project Associate (Horticulture): B.Sc. in Agriculture / Horticulture + 2 Years of Experience Project Fellow (Civil): B.Tech. (Civil) + 5 Years of Experience or M.Tech. (Civil) + 3 Years of Experience Project Fellow (Electrical): B.Tech. (Electrical) + 4 Years of Experience Junior Project Technical Assistant: Diploma or Above (Civil) or Equivalent + 2 Years of Experience Project Consultant (Civil): M.Tech.(Civil) + 4 Years of Experience or B.Tech. (Civil) + 6 Years of Experience

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and relevant experience Online / Offline Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Delhi Project Positions is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies announced for various Project Positions at the National Institute of Technology Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Project Associate positions at NIT Delhi is Rs. 32,800/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Fellow (Civil)?
faq.answer: For the Project Fellow (Civil) post, candidates need to have a B.Tech. in Civil Engineering with 5 years of experience or an M.Tech. in Civil Engineering with 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview date for NIT Delhi Project Positions?
faq.answer: The interview for the NIT Delhi Project Positions is scheduled to be held on 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Delhi is www.nitdelhi.ac.in, where you can find more information.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual Project Positions at NIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What are the selection criteria for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and relevant experience, followed by an online or offline interview.
